name: detectors: each detector completes in <=5s on a 1000-file changeset (per §2.2 detector contract perf requirement)
command: mkdir -p src/routes && for i in $(seq 1 1000); do echo "export const X${i} = ()=>null;" > src/routes/f${i}.tsx; done && for d in a11y-axe bundle-budget rsc-boundary exhaustive-deps; do START=$(date +%s); bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/$d.sh" --json --paths "src/routes/*.tsx" >/dev/null 2>&1; ELAPSED=$(($(date +%s)-START)); [ $ELAPSED -le 5 ] || { echo "FAIL $d took ${ELAPSED}s" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
